title: Writing a register array does not work

features.name: unpacked memory array with computed index write
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array write where the memory index is a computed expression from a register field, not a constant literal

features.name: register array declaration with multi-dimensional unpacked type
features.description: Code should include a register array declaration using unpacked array syntax with both element bit-width and array depth specified

features.name: for-loop workaround for memory write with computed index
features.description: Code should include a for-loop with explicit index comparison as a workaround pattern for writing to memory when computed index causes incorrect behavior
